title: Amtech - Ball Pein Hammer, Polished Head, Comfortable Wooden Handle, Balanced for Punching and Riveting, Ideal for Workshop and Repair Use (8oz / 225g)
features: ENGINEERS HAMMER DESIGN: Balanced head shape for workshop use, shaping and controlled striking on metalwork.
BALL PEIN PROFILE: Supports peining, riveting and forming tasks where accuracy is important.
FOR METALWORKING & DIY: Ideal for garages, workshops and general maintenance tasks.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Built for regular use across DIY and trade environments.
SECURE HANDLING: Designed for confident grip and improved control during use.
description: Product Description Versatility ✓ Ideal for striking, shaping, punching, riveting, and straightening unhardened metals ✓ Balanced 8oz (225g) weight for delicate and detailed tasks ✓ Perfect for workshop projects, metal fabrication, and craft repairs ✓ Provides accurate results across a wide range of metalworking jobs Comfort ✓ Traditional hardwood handle for a natural, secure grip ✓ Smooth, balanced swing for reduced strain ✓ Comfortable control for precise, repeatable impacts ✓ Designed for extended use without fatigue Durability ✓ Hardened and tempered steel head for long-lasting performance ✓ Polished face delivers clean, accurate strikes ✓ Robust construction built to handle frequent workshop use ✓ Reliable strength for project after project Convenience ✓ Lightweight for easy manoeuvring and fine control ✓ Compact size fits neatly into any toolbox ✓ Ready to grab for quick tasks and adjustments ✓ Simple to clean and maintain for long-term use
